installDialog.title: Install {{name}}
installDialog.choosePlatforms: Choose which platforms to install this skill to.
installDialog.noPlatforms: No platforms detected. Add platforms in Settings.
installDialog.selectPlatform: Please select at least one platform.

detail.frontmatterDesc: Structured metadata parsed from the SKILL.md header.
detail.frontmatterRawFallback: This frontmatter could not be parsed reliably, so it is shown as raw YAML.
detail.aiExplanationDesc: Generate a concise explanation of what this skill does and when to use it.
detail.noExplanationDesc: Generate an explanation in your current language.
detail.browserFallbackTitle: Skill detail needs the desktop runtime
detail.browserFallbackDesc: This route now stays stable in the browser preview, but loading live skill data still requires the Tauri app bridge.
detail.fallbackTried: The alternative endpoint was also unreachable.
detail.readOnlyDesc: Plugin-installed copies are display-only here, so install, uninstall, and collection changes are unavailable.
detail.userManagedDesc: This Claude user copy keeps the normal install-state and collection-management controls.
detail.readOnlyInstallBlocked: Install and uninstall are unavailable for read-only plugin copies.
detail.readOnlyCollectionsBlocked: Collection management is unavailable for read-only plugin copies.

collection.noSkillsTitle: No skills in this collection yet.
collection.noSkillsDesc: Add skills to start organizing your toolkit.
collection.deleteConfirm: Delete collection "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

collectionEditor.createDesc: Enter a name and description for the new Collection.
collectionEditor.editDesc: Modify the Collection name and description.

batchInstall.title: Batch Install — {{name}}
batchInstall.desc: Install {{count}} Skills from this Collection as Symlinks to the selected platforms.
batchInstall.noPlatforms: No platforms detected. Add platforms in Settings.
batchInstall.selectPlatform: Please select at least one platform.

collectionPicker.title: Add to Collection
collectionPicker.desc: Select which Collections to add this Skill to.
collectionPicker.noCollections: No collections yet. Create one below.

skillPicker.title: Add Skill
skillPicker.desc: Select skills from Central Skills to add to this Collection.
skillPicker.noSkills: No skills available in Central Skills

settings.title: Settings
settings.scanDirsDesc: Manage the list of directories scanned for skills. Built-in directories cannot be deleted.
settings.customPlatformsDesc: Register custom AI platforms. After adding, the platform appears in the sidebar.
settings.noPlatforms: No custom platforms. Click "Add Platform" to register one.
settings.githubPatDesc: Save a GitHub Personal Access Token for the repo import flow so you do not need to re-enter it each time.
settings.githubPatDirectOnly: This token is used only for direct GitHub requests to github.com, api.github.com, and raw.githubusercontent.com. It is never sent to public mirrors or proxy fallbacks.
settings.githubPatRateLimitHint: Use a token when GitHub preview/import hits rate limits or requires authenticated access.

addDir.title: Add Project Directory
addDir.desc: Enter the path of the custom directory to scan. A rescan will run automatically after adding.

platformDialog.addDesc: Register a new custom platform. A rescan will run automatically after adding.
platformDialog.editDesc: Modify the custom platform name and skills directory.
platformDialog.dirRequired: Skills directory path cannot be empty
platformDialog.dirAutoHint: Auto-generated from Platform Name. You can edit it freely.
platformDialog.dirManualHint: Path manually set. Editing Platform Name won't change it.

empty.welcomeDesc: No skills found in ~/.agents/skills/. Get started by creating a SKILL.md file there, or add custom scan directories in Settings.

globalSearch.title: Command Palette
globalSearch.description: Search for skills, collections, and actions

discover.title: Discover Project Skills
discover.desc: Scan your project directories for skills not yet managed by skills-manage.
discover.scanRootsDesc: Select directories to scan for project-level skills.
discover.noRootsEnabled: No scan roots enabled. Select at least one directory to scan.
discover.noResultsDesc: Click "Discover" to scan your project directories for skills.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.desc: Browse and install skills from remote sources
marketplace.noSkillsDesc: Click "Sync" to fetch skills from this source
marketplace.cacheReused: Reopening this source reuses backend cache by default.
marketplace.notSyncedDesc: The first browse will fetch and cache the skill list.
marketplace.githubImportDesc: Launch the shared GitHub repo import wizard from {{launcher}}.
marketplace.githubImportNoWriteHint: Preview is read-only and performs no write before you confirm import.
marketplace.githubImportDesktopOnlyHint: GitHub repo preview and import are desktop-only actions in this release.
marketplace.githubImportDesktopOnlyState: This shared wizard is available in the browser for guidance, but preview/import actions only run in the desktop app with the Tauri bridge enabled.
marketplace.githubImportSelectionDesc: Choose which skill to inspect and which skills to import.
marketplace.githubImportSelectCurrentSkill: Include this skill in the import
marketplace.githubImportAiSummaryDesc: AI-generated import summary based on the available SKILL.md content.
marketplace.githubImportAiSummaryBody: {{name}} appears ready to import. Current repo summary: {{description}}
marketplace.githubImportAiSummaryFallback: {{name}} is available for import, but this repo preview does not include extra explanation yet.
marketplace.githubImportMarkdownEmpty: This skill has no SKILL.md body
marketplace.githubImportMarkdownBrowserFallback: SKILL.md preview is only available in the desktop app
marketplace.githubImportStatusWillSkip: Local "{{name}}" already exists — will be skipped
marketplace.githubImportTabBadgeUnresolved: This skill has an unresolved conflict
marketplace.githubImportNoConflictBody: This skill can be imported directly with its current id unless you deselect it from the import.
marketplace.githubImportNoDescription: No description provided for this skill.
marketplace.confirmImportDesc: Import {{count}} selected skill(s) into canonical Central storage.
marketplace.githubImportDecisionHintUnselected: {{count}} skill(s) are unselected and won't be part of this import.
marketplace.githubImportReadyListDesc: Final check of the skills that will be written into Central.
marketplace.githubImportConfirmCalmHint: Need to adjust selection or conflict decisions? Go back to Preview to edit before importing.
marketplace.resolveConflictsBeforeImport: Resolve all selected conflicts before importing.
marketplace.githubImportSuccessDesc: {{count}} skill(s) were imported into Central. You can now install any imported skill to specific platforms.
marketplace.githubImportCentralSuccess: GitHub repo skills imported into Central
marketplace.githubImportResultNextDesc: Choose what you want to do next now that the repo import is complete.
marketplace.githubPatSettingsHint: Open Settings and save a GitHub Personal Access Token to use authenticated direct GitHub requests for this import flow.
